Tooltip_craft_WaterPipeDesc: Pipes auto-connect into a network. Plumb sinks, showers and toilets, and link rain collectors, barrels and vessels to share water. Needs a Pipe Wrench.
Tooltip_craft_WaterPipeRiserDesc: A vertical pipe cover for a wall. Connects floor pipes on both sides of the wall and links different floors. Needs a Pipe Wrench.
